rules.title: Forest definition threshold
rules.logic: Land must not be forest at project start. Must meet host-country forest definition if applicable.

rules.title: ARR applicability land eligibility
rules.logic: Land must be non-forest or managed non-forest for 10+ years. VM0047 Section 4 applicability conditions 3-5 exclude tidal wetlands, organic soil/water table manipulation, and mechanical removal/burning of pre-existing dead wood. All exclusions are self-contained in VM0047.

rules.title: ARR quantification approach selection
rules.logic: Two approaches: area-based (plot sampling) or census-based (complete enumeration). Must select based on project characteristics.

rules.title: Geographic boundary and stratification
rules.logic: Project boundary must be fixed ex-ante. Stratification by land cover, soil type, and management regime.

rules.title: Carbon pool selection
rules.logic: AGB and BGB mandatory. Litter, dead wood, SOC optional per Appendix 2 significance test (built-in, replaces external T-SIG). If included in baseline must also be in project scenario.

rules.title: Baseline scenario determination
rules.logic: Area-based approach uses performance benchmark (Appendix 1). Census-based approach uses zero baseline if pre-existing woody biomass <10%. Both approaches fully described in VM0047 Section 6 and Appendix 1.

rules.title: VT0001 additionality requirement
rules.logic: Area-based approach: regulatory surplus + performance benchmark + investment barrier. Census-based approach: regulatory surplus + investment barrier + common practice. Both fully described in VM0047 Section 7.

rules.title: Area-based quantification equation
rules.logic: Removals = min(project C change, project C change x (1 - PB)) - leakage - uncertainty. PB from ex-post reference region observations.

rules.title: Leakage quantification
rules.logic: Activity shifting leakage must be assessed. Market leakage is de minimis for ARR. Fossil fuel and biomass burning emissions must be included.

rules.title: Uncertainty deduction
rules.logic: 15% threshold at 90% CI. If exceeded, excess deducted proportionally from removals. Below threshold, no deduction.

rules.title: Monitoring plan requirements
rules.logic: Four mandatory components: data list, QA/QC, responsibilities, archiving. REDD MRV procedures via M-REDD module.
